items.name: 上川郡農作試験所事務所棟(忠別太駅逓第一美英舎)

en.name_romaji: Kamikawa-gun Nōsaku Shikenjo Jimushotō (Chūbetsuputo Ekiteidai-ichi Bieisha)
en.name_en: Office Building of the Kamikawa County Agricultural Experiment Station (First Chubetsuputo Post Station Bieisha)
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (structure) consisting of an office building of the Kamikawa County agricultural experiment station. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Asahikawa City, designated on 1966-01-15, located at Kamui 1-jo 1-chome.

items.name: 近文山国見の碑
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This is a monument (historic site) known as the Kunimi stone monument on Mount Chikabumi. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Asahikawa City, designated on 1966-01-15, located at Arashiyama, Etanbetsu-cho.

items.name: 梅の木
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 東旭川町米原 旭川第一小校庭
items.description: 員数1本（白梅）。所有者:旭川市。紅梅は平成12年枯死確認、平成13年4月伐採

en.description_en: This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of a plum tree. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Asahikawa City, designated on 1966-01-15, located in the schoolyard of Asahikawa Daiichi Elementary School, Yonehara, Higashiasahikawa-cho.

items.name: 神居古潭おう穴群
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)
items.location: 神居町神居古潭 石狩川河川敷

en.description_en: This is a monument (natural monument) consisting of a cluster of potholes at Kamuikotan. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Asahikawa City, designated on 1966-07-25, located on the Ishikari River bed at Kamuikotan, Kamui-cho.

items.name: 永山屯田兵屋
items.location: 神楽3条7丁目 旭川市博物館

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (structure) consisting of a tonden colonist soldier's house at Nagayama. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Asahikawa City, designated on 1970-07-06, located at the Asahikawa City Museum, Kagura 3-jo 7-chome.

This is a tangible cultural property (structure) consisting of a sericulture (silkworm-raising) farmhouse. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Asahikawa City, designated on 1973-03-19, located at Mizuho 1576-1, Higashiasahikawa-cho.

items.name: 旭川兵村（東旭川屯田）中隊記録

items.description: 員数:旭川兵村中隊記録121冊。所有者:旭川兵村記念館。追加分は別項目参照

en.name_en: Company Records of the Asahikawa Military Colony (Higashiasahikawa Tonden)
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (historical document) consisting of the company records of the Asahikawa military colony (Higashiasahikawa tonden). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Asahikawa City, designated on 1981-02-20, located at the Asahikawa Heison Memorial Hall, Higashiasahikawa Minami 1-jo 6-chome.

items.name: 旭川兵村（東旭川屯田）中隊記録（追加分）
items.location: 東旭川南1条6丁目 旭川兵村記念館
items.description: 員数:旭川兵村中隊記録26冊（追加分）。所有者:旭川兵村記念館

en.name_en: Company Records of the Asahikawa Military Colony (Higashiasahikawa Tonden), Additional Portion
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (historical document) consisting of an additional portion of the company records of the Asahikawa military colony (Higashiasahikawa tonden). It is a municipally designated cultural property of Asahikawa City, designated on 2006-03-30, located at the Asahikawa Heison Memorial Hall, Higashiasahikawa Minami 1-jo 6-chome.

items.name: 錦町5遺跡出土の斧柄
items.location: 神楽3条7丁目 旭川市博物館

en.name_romaji: Nishikimachi Go Iseki Shutsudo no Onoe
en.name_en: Axe Handle Excavated from the Nishikimachi No. 5 Site
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (archaeological material) consisting of an axe handle excavated from the Nishikimachi No. 5 site. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Asahikawa City, designated on 1986-08-20, located at the Asahikawa City Museum, Kagura 3-jo 7-chome.

items.name: 蕨手刀
items.location: 神楽3条7丁目 旭川市博物館

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (archaeological material) consisting of a warabite (bracken-hilted) sword. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Asahikawa City, designated on 1986-08-20, located at the Asahikawa City Museum, Kagura 3-jo 7-chome.

items.name: 旧神居古潭駅舎
items.description: 員数:旧駅舎1棟、便所1棟。所有者:旭川市

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (structure) consisting of the former Kamuikotan station building. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Asahikawa City, designated on 1991-03-15, located at Kasuga 197-1, Etanbetsu-cho.

items.name: 第七師団関係記録

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (historical document) consisting of records relating to the 7th Division. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Asahikawa City, designated on 2006-03-30, located at the Hokuchin Memorial Hall, JGSDF 2nd Division Asahikawa Garrison, Shunko-cho.

items.name: 知里幸恵遺稿ノート
items.location: 神楽3条7丁目 旭川市博物館

en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property (historical document) consisting of the posthumous manuscript notebook of Chiri Yukie. It is a municipally designated cultural property of Asahikawa City, designated on 2006-03-30, located at the Asahikawa City Museum, Kagura 3-jo 7-chome.
